notes: No FST labels in original dataset; estimates based on study population from Vienna and Brisbane (predominantly European-ancestry). Tschandl et al. 2018.
Aggregated from multiple contributing institutions; no uniform FST labeling. Demographic skew mirrors HAM10000 due to overlapping source institutions. Estimate conservative.
Has actual FST labels; sourced from DermaAmin (Ethiopian/Israeli) and Skinision (European). ~20% FST IV-VI per Groh et al. 2021 arxiv.org/abs/2104.09957.
Intentionally sampled for FST diversity from Stanford Health Care. Has verified FST labels. Daneshjou et al. 2022 doi.org/10.1126/sciadv.abq6147.
Small dermoscopy dataset from Hospital Universitario de Coimbra, Portugal. Predominantly European patients; no FST metadata; estimates based on collection context. Mendonca et al. 2013.
198 skin condition categories collected from Chinese hospitals; limited FST metadata. FST distribution estimated from East Asian demographic context. Sun et al. 2016.
